info.title: Bandwidth Override API
info.description: An API to manually set bandwidth speeds.

post.summary: Endpoint to apply interface tags to device.
post.description: An API to manually set bandwidth speeds. (Must be JSON formatted request)

parameters.name: password
parameters.description:
The API key configured in Netreo’s API Administration. Case-sensitive.  
(Required if authentication is enabled.)

parameters.name: pin
parameters.description:
The pin number supplied in Netreo’s API Administration.  
(Required only when using Netreo SaaS-based APIs.)

parameters.name: groupFilterBy
parameters.description: The type of grouping filter to apply to a returned dataset. Possible values are 'category', 'site', 'strategicGroup', 'device', or 'tag'.

parameters.name: groupFilterValue
parameters.description: The value of the groupFilterBy parameter.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description:
Possible values are 'add', 'replace', or 'clear'.  
Add - Add new Bandwidth Override on an interface if one does not already exist.  
Replace - Add new Bandwidth Override and replace existing Bandwidth Overrides.  
Clear - Clear will remove any existing Bandwidth Overrides (Resulting in using detected speed or default value)

parameters.name: expression
parameters.description: The user-provided PERL5 regular expression that will determine which interfaces on a given device will have a bandwidth override applied to them based on a match with the interface SNMP name or description.

parameters.name: replaceValue
parameters.description: The user-provided value of the tag name to replace when the "Replace" option is used in an API call.  This option is required when using the "Replace" option and ignored otherwise.

parameters.name: bandwidthOverride
parameters.description:
An array to specify interface Inbound and outbound Maximum Bandwidth and their respective units for speed. Valid Unit of measurements are [B, K, M, G] which translate to [Bits, Kilo, Mega, Giga] respectively. Providing no Unit value is also acceptable with the default unit being Bits.  
(Required if using 'add' or 'replace' operation)

deviceIndex.description: An internal index that defines a polled and/or monitored device in a Netreo deployment

deviceName.description: The name of the device in Netreo.

interfaceName.description: The name of the interface on the device that was matched

operationStatus.description: The result of a tag application operation.  Possible values here are 'Successful' or "Failed".

targets.description: The user-provided parameter that specifies one or more 'sets' of values that specify the operation to be undertaken, the expression to match against, and the name of the tag that will be the subject of this value set.

TagChangeOperation.description: Operation that can be submitted to a Netreo deployment for the purposes of manipulating interface tags on a device.
